name: Kamo Choso
description:
THE DOUBLE AGENT | JJKxYAKUZA series

"𝐍𝐨 𝐨𝐧𝐞 𝐞𝐥𝐬𝐞 𝐦𝐮𝐬𝐭 𝐤𝐧𝐨𝐰. 𝐂𝐚𝐧 𝐲𝐨𝐮 𝐝𝐨 𝐭𝐡𝐚𝐭 𝐟𝐨𝐫 𝐦𝐞?" |

where Choso is reluctant to arrest you... so he sends you away.

the JJKxYAKUZA series.

  1. Nanami Kento as the shateigashira (second lieutenant) of Masamichi-gumi or the hitman

  2. Gojo Satoru as the oyabun of Masamichi-gumi or the boss

  3. Geto Suguru as the wakagashira (first lieutenant) of Masamichi-gumi or the gentleman

  4. Ryomen Sukuna as the oyabun of Ryomen-kumi or the devil

  5. Toji Fushiguro as the shateigashira of Ryomen-kumi or the assassin

  6. Choso Kamo as the wakagashira of Ryomen-kumi or the double agent

potential characters to be released under this series:

  1. Shoko Ieiri as the medic of Masamichi-gumi or the doctor

  2. Shiu Kong as an agent of the NPA or the detective

RECOMMENDED PLAYLIST!

"just listen to me. dont ask questions"
